features: 【Exceptional Sound Quality】Our Unicorn Kids Karaoke Machine features top-notch audio drivers and advanced digital signal processors, delivering crystal-clear sound for the perfect singing experience. Let your little stars embrace their inner performer and enjoy a truly immersive singing experience.

【Multi-Functional Karaoke Machine】This device functions as a Karaoke Machine, Bluetooth Speaker, and Music Player. Featuring Bluetooth 5.3 technology for instant device pairing, compatibility with smartphones, iPads, PCs, TF card support, and a headphone output port. The wireless microphone pairs automatically with the speaker upon powering up.

【Dynamic Wireless Microphone】The microphone contains 5 magical voice adjustments (Baby, Monster, Female, Male, Original),bring more fun and laughther to everyone. Ultra HD 3D stereo sound and the LED lights dance to the rhythm of the music to create a fun atmosphere.

【Portable and Versatile】The kids Karaoke Machine is designed for easy transportation and can be used in any setting, making it Perfect for birthday parties, hosting events, family karaoke, outdoor camping and more.Get ready to sing and have a blast anytime, anywhere!

【Unicorn Gifts for Girls】Gifts & Toys for Girls aged 3-12, and the perfect gift for a big Unicorn fan! This Karaoke Machine makes a fantastic gift for birthdays, Christmas, and Halloween. Encourage creativity and foster a love for music while unleashing child's singing or speaking talents. if you have any question about our Microphone , please contact us, we will reply within 24 hours!
